summary: The user sought meal prep ideas, specifically protein sources that pair well with quinoa and roasted vegetables. They expressed interest in trying lentil bolognese for the first time and requested a recipe, along with suggestions for sides and seasonings for roasted sweet potatoes. The user decided to use fresh rosemary for their sweet potatoes and expressed a desire to make homemade granola for snacks.
facts: The user is interested in meal prep ideas that include protein sources to pair with quinoa and roasted vegetables. The user has previously had grilled chicken and turkey breast but has never tried lentil or mushroom bolognese. The user requested a simple recipe for lentil bolognese and received a detailed recipe with ingredients and instructions. The user is considering adding roasted sweet potatoes to their meal prep this week and asked for seasoning suggestions. The user decided to use fresh rosemary for seasoning their roasted sweet potatoes. The user is thinking of making a batch of homemade granola to snack on throughout the week and asked for customization suggestions for the recipe.
